## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why is this change needed?

## How to test

```bash
cargo test
```

Or specific manual test steps:
```bash
echo '...' | pick selector
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` has no warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] Added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
